tenanted by Mangal and Śani, the wife of the native will suffer from nasal
nd
disorders. Similarly a Rāśi of Mangal, becoming the 2 from Upa Pad and
occupied by Mangal and Śani, will cause nasal disorders to one‟s wife.
nd
Guru and Śani will, if be in the 2 from Upa Pad, cause disorders of ears
nd
and/or eyes to the wife. If Budh and Mangal are placed in the 2 from Upa
nd
Pad other than their own Rāśis, or, if Rahu is with Guru in the 2 from Upa
Pad, the native‟s wife will suffer from dental disorders. Śani and Rahu
nd
together in one of Śani‟s Rāśis, which is the 2 from Upa Pad, will cause
lameness, or windy disorders to the native‟s wife. These evils will not come

to pass, if there happens to be a Yuti with, or a Drishti from a benefic (or
from another benefic in the case of affliction being caused by a benefic
himself).
23-23½. O Brahmin, all these effects be deduced from the natal Lagn, Lagn
th
